title: Chain 1/8: Get Moving Quotes
scene: 你打电话咨询搬家公司报价。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 搬家公司，请问从哪搬到哪？
turns.en: Moving company. Where are you moving from and to?

turns.cn: 两居室，同城五英里，有电梯。
turns.en: Two-bedroom, five miles across town, both buildings have elevators.

turns.cn: 大概多少箱子和家具？
turns.en: Roughly how many boxes and pieces of furniture?

turns.cn: 三十箱，一张沙发和床。
turns.en: About thirty boxes, a sofa, and a bed.

turns.cn: 报价六百到八百，含车和人。
turns.en: Quote is six to eight hundred, including truck and crew.

turns.cn: 包拆装吗？有保险吗？
turns.en: Does that include assembly? Is there insurance?

turns.cn: 基本险包含，拆装另加一百。
turns.en: Basic insurance is included. Assembly is a hundred extra.

title: Chain 2/8: Book the Move
scene: 你确定搬家公司，预约下周末。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 我选八百那档，下周六上午可以吗？
turns.en: I'll take the eight-hundred option. Next Saturday morning?

turns.cn: 八点 crew 到，预计四小时。
turns.en: Crew arrives at eight AM. About four hours.

turns.cn: 定金多少？能改期吗？
turns.en: What's the deposit? Can I reschedule?

turns.cn: 一百定金，提前三天免费改。
turns.en: One hundred deposit. Free reschedule three days ahead.

turns.cn: 好，我刷卡付定金。
turns.en: Okay. I'll pay the deposit by card.

title: Chain 3/8: Pack Boxes
scene: 搬家前一天，你和室友一起打包。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 厨房我包了，你弄书房？
turns.en: I'll do the kitchen. You take the study?

turns.cn: 行，易碎品我多裹气泡膜。
turns.en: Sure. I'll double-wrap fragile stuff.

turns.cn: 箱子要标房间吗？
turns.en: Should we label boxes by room?

turns.cn: 要，写上「书房」「厨房」，省得乱。
turns.en: Yes. Mark study, kitchen, so nothing gets mixed up.

turns.cn: 旧家具不要的贴「捐」。
turns.en: Tag unwanted furniture for donation.

title: Chain 4/8: Moving Day
scene: 搬家工人到了，你指挥摆放家具。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 沙发放客厅还是楼上？
turns.en: Should the sofa go in the living room or upstairs?

turns.cn: 客厅靠窗，床放主卧。
turns.en: Living room by the window. Bed in the master bedroom.

turns.cn: 这个衣柜要拆门才能进。
turns.en: We'll need to take the closet doors off to fit this in.

turns.cn: 可以，小心别刮墙。
turns.en: That's fine. Please be careful not to scratch the walls.

turns.cn: 放心。小费包含在账单里吗？
turns.en: No problem. Is gratuity included in the bill?

turns.cn: 现金另给，你们辛苦了。
turns.en: I'll tip in cash. Thanks for the hard work.

title: Chain 5/8: Old Place Check-out
scene: 搬空后，你和房东检查旧房。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 今天来检查一下房子状况。
turns.en: I'm here to inspect the apartment today.

turns.cn: 我已经打扫干净了，钥匙在这。
turns.en: I've cleaned everything. Here are the keys.

turns.cn: 墙上有个小洞，要扣一点押金。
turns.en: There's a small hole in the wall. We'll deduct a little from the deposit.

turns.cn: 多少？我可以自己补。
turns.en: How much? I can fix it myself.

turns.cn: 五十美元，或者您修好也行。
turns.en: Fifty dollars, or you can repair it.

turns.cn: 我周末来补，补好再退押金可以吗？
turns.en: I'll patch it this weekend. Can I get the deposit back then?

title: Chain 6/8: Change Address
scene: 搬家后你去银行改地址。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 我搬家了，要更新账户地址。
turns.en: I moved and need to update my account address.

turns.cn: 请填这张表，带新地址证明。
turns.en: Please fill out this form with proof of your new address.

turns.cn: 水电账单可以吗？
turns.en: Will a utility bill work?

turns.cn: 可以，三个月内的。
turns.en: Yes, from within the last three months.

turns.cn: 支票和卡会寄到新地址吗？
turns.en: Will checks and cards go to the new address?

turns.cn: 对，七到十个工作日更新。
turns.en: Yes. It updates in seven to ten business days.

title: Chain 7/8: Set Up Internet
scene: 你打电话预约新家装宽带。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 宽带客服，新装还是迁移？
turns.en: Internet support. New install or transfer?

turns.cn: 新地址安装，要三百兆套餐。
turns.en: New address install. I want the three-hundred-meg plan.

turns.cn: 周三下午技术员上门，人在家吗？
turns.en: Technician Wednesday afternoon. Will someone be home?

turns.cn: 在，需要自带路由器吗？
turns.en: Yes. Should I provide my own router?

turns.cn: 可以租我们的，每月五块。
turns.en: You can rent ours for five a month.

turns.cn: 我有，就用我的。
turns.en: I have one. I'll use mine.

title: Chain 8/8: Housewarming
scene: 搬完家，你邀请朋友来暖房。（对话链：搬家）

turns.cn: 新家不错！还需要帮忙吗？
turns.en: Nice place! Need any more help?

turns.cn: 差不多了，还差几个箱子没开。
turns.en: Almost done. A few boxes still unopened.

turns.cn: 我带了披萨和啤酒。
turns.en: I brought pizza and beer.

turns.cn: 太及时了，冰箱刚通电。
turns.en: Perfect timing. The fridge just got power.

turns.cn: 恭喜乔迁！
turns.en: Congrats on the move!

turns.cn: 谢谢，总算安定下来了。
turns.en: Thanks. Finally settling in.
